productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Green Shoes
description: Style NoteA flexible outsole with a plush crush-worthy nubuck upper, you'll never have a style slump when you're off-duty, if you're equipped with this Benetton pair. Wear this with a tonal monochrome tee or a bomber jacket. Product DetailsSquare toed, casual penny loafer in green with slip on styling and stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxTwo tone nubuck upper with reinforced overlays at the heel collarPadded collar and tongue and an ergonomically shaped insoleUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlightUse a leather conditioner to polish the upper
